review_text:
Located on the Princess Highway Bomaderry.

Lovely and Quiet.
With the Villas well set back from the Highway.

Beautiful and Very well Maintained.

Found Tim to be Very Friendly and Helpful.
Going above and beyond with Great recommendations of local businesses.

The Villa was Large and Fabulous.

Has a Separate Bedroom and Bathroom.

And a Very well Equipped Kitchen. With all the Appliances, Pots and Pans, Crockery and Cutlery you would need.

There’s a BBQ Area, a Beautiful Pool and a Laundry Room.

We had a wonderful stay at Treehaven Tourist Park. The accommodation was clean, comfortable, and perfect for a relaxing getaway. What really stood out was the excellent customer service — staff member we interacted with was friendly, helpful, and genuinely committed to making our stay enjoyable. The whole experience felt warm, welcoming, and well taken care of. Highly recommended for anyone looking for a peaceful and comfortable place to stay.

The owners are so rude
The cleaning ladies are amazing but one doesn't understand English
I had to get my own cleaner in to clean the room.
I had to leave with my 2 little kids and leave my 2 older kids there with thier dad because my 5 year old son is a level 3 autism kids and other additional needs
But still wants money for the stains in the towels. I spent over 1400 dollars to stay there for 2 weeks. When they find out where your staying next they will slander your name to the next people....
If you have kids with additional needs PLEASE DON'T STAY THERE.......
Although entrance is right at Princess Highway, this place is very quiet and relaxing.

Surrounded by lots of stuff and the cabin was small but good.
P.S Don’t underestimate the pool
Great place to stay & liked how they had their own restaurant, food was delicious.
Room was roomy and clean, very comfortable,  staff helpful and great wi fi, only downside was the TV reception was bad.

Great location close to shops, clubs, and tourist attractions.  Staff were friendly and helpful they will go out of their way to assist you.  I left an item behind in my cabin they found it and returned it to my home address.  Cabins were clean with air conditioning, TV, and a full-size fridge.
Lovely Park, great place to stay while visiting Nowra and surrounding areas. Highly recommended.

Air-conditioned too farway from bedroom, very hot at night time,
Also too many flyes at night and ants,
